title: Create Big Cannons: Damage Nerf
description: Nerfs Cannon and Autocannon Block Damage. Useful for longer battles.
body:
# Functionality

This datapack nerfs all types of block damage dealt by Autocannons and Shells. Fluid Shells are unchanged! This project is ideal for players wanting to create long-lasting fights utilizing Create Aeronautics, but can also be used for ground fights.

# Intention

This datapack was created because the creator believed CBC was too powerful and could destroy the landscape and structures in an overpowered way, especially when it came to Create Aeronautics airship battles. Since the creator was not able to find an existing project that nerfed CBC for these situations, this datapack came to be.

## Credits:

Gallery images use **Bliss Shaders** and **Sky Archipelago**
